title: Hybrid Search
description: A hybrid search component that combines vector similarity search with BM25
keyword search for improved retrieval accuracy. Uses Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
to merge results from both search signals, producing a unified ranking that
captures both semantic meaning and exact keyword matches. Configurable alpha
parameter controls the balance between vector and keyword search. Ideal for
RAG pipelines where neither pure semantic nor pure keyword search alone is sufficient.
Receives questions with attached documents (from an upstream vector
store search) and re-ranks them using hybrid vector + BM25 scoring.
Produces documents re-ranked by hybrid search score, combining
vector similarity and keyword relevance via Reciprocal Rank Fusion.
Produces an answer composed from the top-ranked documents.

balanced.title: Balanced - Equal weight to vector and keyword search

search_hybrid.alpha.title: Alpha (vector weight)
search_hybrid.alpha.description: Weight for vector scores (0.0 = BM25 only, 1.0 = vector only, 0.5 = balanced)

search_hybrid.top_k.title: Top K results
search_hybrid.top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return after hybrid ranking

search_hybrid.rrf_k.title: RRF constant (k)
search_hybrid.rrf_k.description: Reciprocal Rank Fusion constant. Higher values reduce impact of top rankings

search_hybrid.profile.title: Search mode
search_hybrid.profile.description: Select the balance between vector and keyword search
